data.body:
## TDD Requirement

Write failing tests (RED state) for sprint-list-epics.sh v2 removal.

## Implementation Steps

1. Add new test functions to tests/scripts/test-sprint-list-epics.sh:
   - test_sprint_list_epics_no_v2_else_branch: assert grep -q '# v2 path: read .tickets/' plugins/dso/scripts/sprint-list-epics.sh exits non-zero
   - test_sprint_list_epics_no_TICKETS_DIR_variable: assert grep -q '^TICKETS_DIR=' plugins/dso/scripts/sprint-list-epics.sh exits non-zero
   - test_sprint_list_epics_no_INDEX_FILE_variable: assert grep -q '^INDEX_FILE=' plugins/dso/scripts/sprint-list-epics.sh exits non-zero
   - test_sprint_list_epics_no_TK_variable: assert grep -q '^TK=' plugins/dso/scripts/sprint-list-epics.sh exits non-zero
   - test_sprint_list_epics_no_rebuild_index_function: assert grep -q '_rebuild_index' plugins/dso/scripts/sprint-list-epics.sh exits non-zero

2. Verify each test fails (RED state — v2 code still present).

## Test File Notes
- Existing: tests/scripts/test-sprint-list-epics.sh
- Source: sprint-list-epics.sh → fuzzy: sprintlistepicssh — substring of testsprintlistepicssh. Fuzzy match OK.
- Note: The existing tests in test-sprint-list-epics.sh use TICKETS_DIR env for v2 tests. Those v2-path tests will need updating in Task 8. Confirm existing v2-using tests also become RED.

## Files Modified
- tests/scripts/test-sprint-list-epics.sh (Edit — append new test functions)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] test_sprint_list_epics_no_v2_else_branch function exists
  Verify: grep -q 'test_sprint_list_epics_no_v2_else_branch' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-sprint-list-epics.sh
- [ ] test_sprint_list_epics_no_TK_variable function exists
  Verify: grep -q 'test_sprint_list_epics_no_TK_variable' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-sprint-list-epics.sh
- [ ] Tests FAIL on current codebase (RED state)
  Verify: { bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-sprint-list-epics.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'FAIL'; }
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
